title: ReEstrogen
description: Self Expression and HRT through the magic of colors!
body:
![ReEstrogen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf68a142ea63fa8e59f40bb281822074b7ec785e.png)

**Requires CuriosAPI**
**(If you prefer Accessories use this!)**

![Compat Layer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c64efd7d4ddd91ada765bf00e7fe23cafd3519f1.png)

https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-compat-layer

**Features**

- Player Model Effects!
- Estrodial/Estrogen (Patches, Pills, Gels, Implants & Injections)
- Testosterone (Pills, Gels & Injections)
- Spironolactone
- Progesterone
- Prideblossom (Pride themed flowers found in any overworld biome, also supports modded biomes!)
- Gender Fluid (Key Crafting Material)
- Gender Affirming Effect (Increases your confidence and grants you extra armor!)
- Euphoric Effect (Increases your health by two hearts, granted after over 5 doses of hrt of your choice)
- Dash Ability (When Euphoric Affect is active, uses hunger)

**Built to work by itself, but has compat with mods like Create.**

**Mod Compat:**

- Create
- Create Dragons Plus
- Botany Pots
- Toasty's Mobs
- Just Blahaj
- Only Blahaj
- Etched
- Farmer's Delight

![Prideblossoms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5554bdd7f52ba565c10b0b535bf185f1802f2892_0.webp)

[ReEstrogen Wiki](https://reestrogen.fandom.com/wiki/ReEstrogen_Wiki)

[Join Our Discord!](https://discord.gg/75x6tzuGR6)
